Quick Start

Easy Setup — No Coding Required

Get started with AI skills in minutes

1

Install CLI

Install ClawdHub CLI tool globally

npm install -g clawdhub
2

Search Skills

Search for skills you need

clawdhub search <skill-name>
3

Install Skill

Install the specified skill to your OpenClawSkills

npx clawdhub@latest install <skill-slug>

Skill Loading Priority

1
Workspace
<project>/skills/
Project-level (Highest)
2
Global
~/.openclaw/skills/
Global-level
3
Bundled
Built-in
Built-in skills
